title: Antoine & Antoinette
writer: Jacques Becker, Maurice Griffe, Françoise Giroud
actors: Roger Pigaut, Claire Mafféi, Noël Roquevert
plot: Working class couple Antoine and Antoinette dream of a better life. In the midst of constantly fending off the unwanted attention of men, especially the grocer Monsieur Roland, Antoinette purchases a winning lottery ticket. But wh...
